Qingzhi Automotive Technology (Suzhou) Co., Ltd. (branded as TSIntel) is an innovative tech enterprise focusing on intelligent vehicle systems. Founded in 2016 as 'Tianjin Qingzhi Technology' and subsequently relocated to Suzhou's Xiangcheng District—a strategic national hub for autonomous driving—the company operates at the intersection of automotive electronics and big data. Despite a relatively small registered capital (~6.89M RMB), its foreign-invested structure and sophisticated business scope (including autonomous vehicle tech, big data services, and value-added telecommunications) position it as a specialized Tier-1.5 or software/hardware integrator for smart mobility solutions.
